creator: wynkoop@cs.stevens.edu
text:
any attempt to use pkg_add -r or sysinstall to install packages fails.  Investigation using an ftp client shows that the needed directory can not be accessed on any ftp mirror I have tried.  It is also hosed on the primary ftp site.

Fix: 

fix the ftp tree on the master and mirror sites.
How-To-Repeat: pkg_add -r on any 6.2 system.
